series_metadata.series_description: These files contain correspondence between state-chartered banks and the Ohio Division of Financial Institutions regarding the examination process and requirements of the Division, including all material related to this correspondence.

retention_rules.disposition: Microform: Retain microfilm in operating area as well as off-site storage facility for twenty (20) years after date of examination and then destroy. ; Paper: Retain paper copy in operating area until imaged and indexed. Upon confirmation that paper copy has been checked for quality and completeness, destroy. ; Electronic: Retain electronic files for twenty (20) years after date of examination and then destroy., Microform: Shred ; Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Erase
